title: Fragment: 'Follow To The Deep Wood's Weeds'.
content:
Follow to the deep wood's weeds,
    Follow to the wild-briar dingle,
    Where we seek to intermingle,
    And the violet tells her tale
    To the odour-scented gale,
    For they two have enough to do
    Of such work as I and you.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment: 'Follow To The Deep Wood's Weeds'."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
